calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-01-2025 Continued For Letter To Oct-15-25 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for an Order of Examinatioon as to Defendant Lukas Cargo Systems, LLC.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Matter not reported.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau is present represented by Theresia Sandhu.
Defendant Lukas Cargo Systems LLC not appearing.

The court deems there is proper service of the Order of Examination.

This matter is continued to October 15, 2025 at 11:00am in dept. 505. A bench latter is issued and mailed to Serge Ignatyuk Managing Member of Lukas Cargo Systems LLC.
